title: pabstia viridis
intro: Pabstia viridis, also known as Pabst's green, is a plant species in the family Orchidaceae. Traditionally, Pabstia viridis has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and respiratory problems due to its anthelmintic and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and even exhibiting antiviral and antimicrobial properties. In herbal preparations, Pabstia viridis is often used in teas, infusions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its safety and efficacy as a medicinal treatment.
